title: SensorReport
description: A single measurement from one sensor at one update. POSG invariant: this message must NEVER contain a ground-truth entity id or true state — only the sensor's own noisy measurement. report_id is a per-sensor sequence number, NOT an entity identity.

t.description: Timestamp of the measurement (sim seconds), AFTER sensor latency is applied

report_id.description: Per-sensor monotonically increasing sequence number. Carries no entity identity.

measurement.description: Measurement in the sensor's native space

covariance.description: Measurement covariance matrix (row-major). 2x2 for cartesian, 1x1 for bearing-only.

is_clutter_truth.description: DEBUG/EVAL ONLY. Stripped from the fusion-facing stream; present only in the ground-truth eval sidecar.
